      "source": [
        "# Full Complete Code for Your MPG Fuel Efficiency Case Study\n",
        "# (Copy-paste this entire block into a new Jupyter Notebook / Google Colab)\n",
        "# This is the exact parallel to the \"Example Codes.pdf\" you have — ready to run,\n",
        "# produces all plots, models, and prints exactly as described in the case study I gave you.\n",
        "# Dataset auto-loaded from public UCI (no download needed). Works in Colab or local Jupyter.\n",
        "# Run cell-by-cell or all at once. Deadline 16th March 2026 — you're good!\n",
        "\n",
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "import seaborn as sns\n",
        "from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler\n",
        "from sklearn.decomposition import PCA\n",
        "from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split\n",
        "from sklearn.linear_model import LinearRegression\n",
        "from sklearn.metrics import mean_absolute_error, mean_squared_error, r2_score\n",
        "from sklearn.ensemble import RandomForestRegressor\n",
        "import tensorflow as tf\n",
        "from tensorflow.keras.models import Sequential\n",
        "from tensorflow.keras.layers import Dense, Dropout\n",
        "\n",
        "# ======================\n",
        "# 1. Load the data\n",
        "# ======================\n",
        "column_names = ['mpg', 'cylinders', 'displacement', 'horsepower', 'weight',\n",
        "                'acceleration', 'model_year', 'origin', 'car_name']\n",
        "\n",
        "df = pd.read_csv('https://archive.ics.uci.edu/ml/machine-learning-databases/auto-mpg/auto-mpg.data',\n",
        "                 delim_whitespace=True, names=column_names, na_values='?')\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Original shape:\", df.shape)\n",
        "df.head()\n",
        "\n",
        "# ======================\n",
        "# Clean and Preprocess data\n",
        "# ======================\n",
        "\n",
        "# 1. Remove unnecessary column\n",
        "df.drop('car_name', axis=1, inplace=True)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. Handle missing values (horsepower has '?' → NaN)\n",
        "df['horsepower'] = pd.to_numeric(df['horsepower'], errors='coerce')\n",
        "print(\"Missing values before fill:\\n\", df.isnull().sum())\n",
        "df['horsepower'].fillna(df['horsepower'].median(), inplace=True)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 3. Convert origin to readable labels (for plotting)\n",
        "df['origin'] = df['origin'].map({1: 'USA', 2: 'Europe', 3: 'Japan'})\n",
        "\n",
        "# 4. Add numeric version for modeling\n",
        "df['origin_num'] = df['origin'].map({'USA': 1, 'Europe': 2, 'Japan': 3})\n",
        "\n",
        "# 5. Check & remove duplicates (none in this dataset)\n",
        "print(f\"Duplicate rows: {df.duplicated().sum()}\")\n",
        "# df.drop_duplicates(inplace=True)  # not needed\n",
        "\n",
        "# 6. Final check\n",
        "print(\"Cleaned shape:\", df.shape)\n",
        "df.head()\n",
        "\n",
        "# ======================\n",
        "# Exploratory Data Analysis\n",
        "# ======================\n",
        "\n",
        "# 1. Basic statistics\n",
        "print(\"\\nBasic statistics:\")\n",
        "print(df.describe())\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. MPG Distribution Analysis\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))\n",
        "sns.histplot(data=df, x='mpg', bins=30, kde=True)\n",
        "plt.title(\"Distribution of MPG in Cars\")\n",
        "plt.xlabel(\"Miles Per Gallon (MPG)\")\n",
        "plt.ylabel(\"Frequency\")\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "# Boxplot of MPG\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))\n",
        "sns.boxplot(data=df['mpg'], orient='h')\n",
        "plt.title(\"Boxplot of MPG\")\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "# 3. MPG by Origin\n",
        "avg_mpg = df.groupby('origin')['mpg'].mean().sort_values(ascending=False)\n",
        "print(\"\\nAverage MPG per Origin:\\n\", avg_mpg)\n",
        "\n",
        "avg_mpg.plot(kind='bar', figsize=(10, 5), color='skyblue')\n",
        "plt.title(\"Average MPG per Origin\")\n",
        "plt.xlabel(\"Origin\")\n",
        "plt.ylabel(\"Average MPG\")\n",
        "plt.xticks(rotation=0)\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "# 4. Principal Component Analysis (PCA)\n",
        "features_for_pca = ['cylinders', 'displacement', 'horsepower', 'weight',\n",
        "                    'acceleration', 'model_year', 'origin_num']\n",
        "\n",
        "nutrition_df = df[features_for_pca]\n",
        "scaler = StandardScaler()\n",
        "nutrition_scaled = scaler.fit_transform(nutrition_df)\n",
        "\n",
        "pca = PCA()\n",
        "principal_components = pca.fit_transform(nutrition_scaled)\n",
        "eigenvalues = pca.explained_variance_\n",
        "total_variation = sum(eigenvalues)\n",
        "print(\"Eigenvalues (Explained Variance):\", eigenvalues)\n",
        "print(f\"Total Variation: {total_variation:.4f}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Scree plot\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))\n",
        "plt.plot(range(1, len(eigenvalues)+1), eigenvalues, 'bo-', linewidth=2)\n",
        "plt.title('Scree Plot')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Principal Component')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Eigenvalue (Explained Variance)')\n",
        "plt.axhline(y=1, color='r', linestyle='--')\n",
        "plt.grid()\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "# 5. Origin-wise Data Balance\n",
        "print(\"\\nNumber of cars per origin:\")\n",
        "print(df[\"origin\"].value_counts())\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))\n",
        "sns.countplot(data=df, x='origin', order=['USA', 'Japan', 'Europe'])\n",
        "plt.title(\"Number of Cars per Origin\")\n",
        "plt.xlabel(\"Origin\")\n",
        "plt.ylabel(\"Count\")\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "# 6. Origin-wise Comparison of Key Features\n",
        "data = df.copy()\n",
        "origin_stats = data.groupby('origin')[['weight', 'horsepower', 'displacement']].mean()\n",
        "print(\"\\nOrigin-wise average features:\\n\", origin_stats)\n",
        "\n",
        "origin_stats.plot(kind='bar', figsize=(12, 6))\n",
        "plt.title('Origin-wise Comparison of Key Features')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Amount')\n",
        "plt.xticks(rotation=0)\n",
        "plt.legend(title='Features')\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "# 7. Correlation heatmap\n",
        "numeric_cols = ['mpg', 'weight', 'horsepower', 'displacement', 'cylinders']\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(10, 8))\n",
        "sns.heatmap(df[numeric_cols].corr(), annot=True, cmap='coolwarm', fmt='.2f')\n",
        "plt.title(\"Feature Correlation Heatmap\")\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "# 8. Scatter plots\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(18, 5))\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.subplot(1, 3, 1)\n",
        "sns.scatterplot(x='weight', y='mpg', data=df, hue='origin', palette='viridis')\n",
        "plt.title('MPG vs Weight')\n",
        "plt.subplot(1, 3, 2)\n",
        "sns.scatterplot(x='horsepower', y='mpg', data=df, hue='origin', palette='viridis')\n",
        "plt.title('MPG vs Horsepower')\n",
        "plt.subplot(1, 3, 3)\n",
        "sns.scatterplot(x='displacement', y='mpg', data=df, hue='origin', palette='viridis')\n",
        "plt.title('MPG vs Displacement')\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "# ======================\n",
        "# ML/AI methods\n",
        "# ======================\n",
        "\n",
        "# Select features and target\n",
        "X = df[['cylinders', 'displacement', 'horsepower', 'weight',\n",
        "        'acceleration', 'model_year', 'origin_num']]\n",
        "y = df['mpg']\n",
        "\n",
        "# Train-test split\n",
        "X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test = train_test_split(X, y, test_size=0.3, random_state=42)\n",
        "\n",
        "## Linear Regression\n",
        "lr_model = LinearRegression()\n",
        "lr_model.fit(X_train, y_train)\n",
        "lr_pred = lr_model.predict(X_test)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\nLinear Regression Performance:\")\n",
        "print(\"MAE:\", mean_absolute_error(y_test, lr_pred))\n",
        "print(\"MSE:\", mean_squared_error(y_test, lr_pred))\n",
        "print(\"R2 Score:\", r2_score(y_test, lr_pred))\n",
        "\n",
        "## Random Forest Regressor\n",
        "rf_model = RandomForestRegressor(n_estimators=100, random_state=42)\n",
        "rf_model.fit(X_train, y_train)\n",
        "rf_pred = rf_model.predict(X_test)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\nRandom Forest Regressor Performance:\")\n",
        "print(\"MAE:\", mean_absolute_error(y_test, rf_pred))\n",
        "print(\"MSE:\", mean_squared_error(y_test, rf_pred))\n",
        "print(\"R2 Score:\", r2_score(y_test, rf_pred))\n",
        "\n",
        "## Neural Network Model\n",
        "model = Sequential([\n",
        "    Dense(128, activation='relu', input_shape=(X_train.shape[1],)),\n",
        "    Dropout(0.2),\n",
        "    Dense(64, activation='relu'),\n",
        "    Dropout(0.2),\n",
        "    Dense(32, activation='relu'),\n",
        "    Dense(1)\n",
        "])\n",
        "\n",
        "model.compile(optimizer='adam', loss='mse', metrics=['mae'])\n",
        "history = model.fit(X_train, y_train, epochs=100, batch_size=16,\n",
        "                    validation_data=(X_test, y_test), verbose=0)\n",
        "\n",
        "nn_pred = model.predict(X_test).flatten()\n",
        "print(\"\\nNeural Network Performance:\")\n",
        "print(\"MAE:\", mean_absolute_error(y_test, nn_pred))\n",
        "print(\"MSE:\", mean_squared_error(y_test, nn_pred))\n",
        "print(\"R2 Score:\", r2_score(y_test, nn_pred))\n",
        "\n",
        "# ======================\n",
        "# Quick Model Comparison Table (run this cell last)\n",
        "# ======================\n",
        "comparison = pd.DataFrame({\n",
        "    'Model': ['Linear Regression', 'Random Forest', 'Neural Network'],\n",
        "    'R2': [r2_score(y_test, lr_pred), r2_score(y_test, rf_pred), r2_score(y_test, nn_pred)],\n",
        "    'MAE': [mean_absolute_error(y_test, lr_pred), mean_absolute_error(y_test, rf_pred), mean_absolute_error(y_test, nn_pred)],\n",
        "    'MSE': [mean_squared_error(y_test, lr_pred), mean_squared_error(y_test, rf_pred), mean_squared_error(y_test, nn_pred)]\n",
        "})\n",
        "print(comparison.round(3))"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
